category_sources: Official homepage says git-annex manages large files with git, syncs, backs up, and archives data.
source_facts.description says it manages files with git without checking in file contents.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and man page use git-annex.
docs_sources: Official git-annex man page documents command synopsis, description, examples, and commands.
Official homepage is the primary documentation wiki with install, walkthrough, tips, key concepts, and details.
repo_sources: Official git-annex site links History to source.git-annex.branchable.com and contribution docs describe cloning git://git-annex.branchable.com/.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes large-file management, sync, backup, archive, checksums, and encryption.
